name: LessonQuickfire
goal: Run a timed sequence of short multiple-choice rounds with optional score tracking, per-round timer, and a final summary. Mixes scored quiz rounds and unscored poll/opinion rounds in any combination.
description: Timed practice round. Cycles through QuickfireRound entries; each round shows the prompt, options, and a thin timer bar that empties over `timer` seconds. If a round has `correct`, picks flash green/red and count toward the score; if `correct` is omitted (poll/opinion round), the picked option flashes neutral and the round is excluded from the score. After the last round emits lesson-quickfire-done; reset() restarts. Final screen shows `score / scoredRoundCount`, or just `Done!` when no round was scored.

props.name: rounds
props.description: Array of { prompt, options, correct? }. `correct` is optional and accepts a single string or an array of accepted strings (any match counts). Numbers are coerced to strings. Omit `correct` for poll/opinion rounds — those rounds are excluded from scoring.

props.name: timer
props.description: Seconds allowed per round before auto-advance.

events.name: lesson-quickfire-done
events.description: Fires once after the last round resolves. `total` is the count of rounds that had a `correct` field (i.e. the scoring denominator), not the total round count.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Restarts the sequence at round 0 with score 0.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical margin + prompt top/bottom margin + timer top margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Meta line bottom margin + options gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Option hover border + restart button background.

sideEffects.description: Runs a 100ms setInterval while a round is active; cleared on pick, advance, or disconnect.
sideEffects.reason: Powers the visible timer bar and the auto-advance when time runs out.

sideEffects.description: Tracks current round index, score, time-left, and flash state in component state.
sideEffects.reason: Required to drive the round flow and final summary.

nondeterministicReason: timer, state side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
